title: STAYTPMV
description:
A sneak peek at what my upcoming Funny Rave: Sweet Baby Raves set has to offer. You can watch everyone live over at http://twitch.tv/funnyrave during July 3rd-4th and July 10th-11th.
Full lineup and more info here: https://twitter.com/funnierrave/status/1406055876041920516 I hope to see you all there when my set goes live!

This was also going to be part of a multivideo project with Ross (https://www.youtube.com/c/soarozz, https://twitter.com/soaroz/status/1409337655737958404) and Zajac (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cLN12I_0xsw) but real life scrambled the plans so now it's Round 1 of Crackhead EDM Soccer with @soarozz 
#ytpmv

Song: TYNAN & Ace Aura - Stay
If anyone has any better ideas for the video title please comment with them because I have no clue what to name this lmao

Second Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/frannintendo64
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Xarlable/status/1409320738092470272
Discord: https://discord.gg/ZF4VCmkwZ7
